messages.subject: [R-SIG-Finance] ugarchsim for data simulation
messages.body_plain:
Hi, everyone, 


I am using the ugarchsim comand from library rugarch for generating simulated data. I need to know if the data generated are squared or the root has already been extracted. 

Thank you, 


Fabian C. Cardoso, M.Sc. 



	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
